title: Singing Competition
description: Group worship performance celebrating faith through song in Tamil or English.
rules: Group participation only (minimum 5 participants).
Maximum performance time: 7 minutes (including mic check and setup).
Songs must align with Christian values and the ASCEND 2026 theme.
Languages: Tamil or English.
Keyboard, Drum Pad, and Guitar will be provided.

title: Character Portrayal
description: Bring a Biblical character to life and connect their story to the theme of RENEW.
rules: Maximum 3 participants per team.
Portray a Biblical character relevant to the ASCEND 2026 theme.
Presentation must not exceed 7 minutes.
Appropriate costumes and props are permitted.
Explain the character and its relevance to the theme.

title: Short Film Competition
description: Create a powerful short film that communicates the message of transformation and renewal.
rules: Based on the ASCEND 2026 theme.
Maximum duration: 5 minutes.
Must promote Christian values and originality.
Record using a mobile phone.
Filters/visual effects are not permitted.
Submit on or before August 2.

title: Hand Painting
description: Express the theme of RENEW through creative hand-painted artwork created live on-site.
rules: Artwork must be based on the ASCEND 2026 theme.
Duration: 30 minutes.
Materials will be provided by the Host Church.
Artwork must be created during the competition.

title: Bible Quiz
description: Test your knowledge of the Book of Proverbs in an interactive team quiz competition.
rules: Team Size: 3 Participants.
Duration: 1 Hour.
Bible Portion: Book of Proverbs (Full Book).
Questions will be based on the prescribed Bible portion.
Multiple interactive rounds.
Detailed format and scoring will be explained before the competition.
Use of mobile phones, smart watches, Bibles, or reference materials is prohibited.
Violation will result in immediate disqualification.
Quiz Master's and Judges' decision is final.
